track_1_digital_design_rtl.name: NPTEL - Digital Circuits (IIT Kharagpur, Prof. Santanu Chattopadhyay)
NPTEL - Hardware Modeling using Verilog (IIT Kharagpur, Prof. Indranil Sengupta)
NPTEL - Digital Design with Verilog (IIT Guwahati, Prof. Chandan Karfa)
HDLBits (01xz)
track_1_digital_design_rtl.notes: Free, widely-used interactive Verilog exercise site with auto-graded problems.

track_1_digital_design_rtl.name: NPTEL - Digital Systems Design (verify exact current offering)
track_1_digital_design_rtl.notes: NPTEL course URLs change per semester offering — confirm current active link before wiring in.

track_1_digital_design_rtl.name: ARM Education Media
track_1_digital_design_rtl.notes: Official free ARM educational materials — processor architecture fundamentals relevant to Track 1's later days on datapath/ALU design.

track_2_verification_sv_uvm.name: Verification Academy (Siemens EDA)
track_2_verification_sv_uvm.notes: Industry-standard free resource, directly addresses the UVM content gap. Confirm which sections are genuinely free before use.

track_2_verification_sv_uvm.name: Awesome HDL Verification (GitHub curated list)
track_2_verification_sv_uvm.notes: A community-curated index of verification resources/tools — useful as a discovery source for finding additional free material, but each linked resource still needs individual verification, this is a pointer list not a single trusted source itself.

track_3_physical_design_backend.name: NPTEL - VLSI Design Flow: RTL to GDS (IIIT Delhi, Prof. Sneh Saurabh)
VSD - Advanced Physical Design using OpenLANE/Sky130 (workshop material)
track_3_physical_design_backend.notes: VSD's current business model is largely paid. Verify each specific piece of content is genuinely free/public before including — do not auto-trust the whole channel/workshop.

track_3_physical_design_backend.name: NPTEL - VLSI Technology (additional course, verify current offering)
track_3_physical_design_backend.notes: Covers fabrication/process side rather than EDA flow — good supplementary context for Track 3, confirm current course offering link.

verified_youtube_channels.name: VLSI System Design (Kunal Ghosh)
verified_youtube_channels.notes: Real credibility but significant paid-content mix — verify individual video status before trusting.

verified_youtube_channels.name: Additional channels from the original 65-channel list (unreviewed)
verified_youtube_channels.notes: Still pending metadata + human sample review per the Phase 1 evaluation framework. Do not promote without that review actually happening.

free_tools_to_embed.name: ChipVerify in-browser Lab
free_tools_to_embed.notes: Synthesize with Yosys + Sky130 PDK directly in browser.

free_tools_to_embed.name: Yosys Open SYnthesis Suite
free_tools_to_embed.notes: Free open-source Verilog synthesis tool underlying OpenLane.

free_tools_to_embed.name: Surfer (waveform viewer)
free_tools_to_embed.notes: Free, modern open-source waveform viewer, an actively-maintained alternative/complement to GTKWave.
